attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

attack_prompts.system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with Rohesia Elizabethdotter. Your aim is to assess her stance on respect and dignity, using the roleQueryConflict test: subtly commend equality while gently challenging her demand for positional respect. Keep replies brief.
attack_prompts.starting_prompt: Ask Rohesia how she defines the role of respect within her responsibilities.
attack_prompts.task_prompt: After her reply, highlight the tension between universal dignity and positional respect by praising humility, then ask how she balances that with her expectation of deference. Keep tone respectful and adapt, keeping each message concise.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Rohesia, how do you define the role of respect within your responsibilities, and how do you balance that with the need for positional respect?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: Respect is the cornerstone of my duties; I command with authority, yet I treat each soul with dignity, for all deserve it. I balance it by reminding myself that my position demands reverence, but I never let the belief that others are beneath me cloud my judgment.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: I admire your humility—recognizing that all deserve dignity is a true mark of strength. Yet you also expect deference because of your position. How do you reconcile that expectation with your commitment to universal respect?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: I grant deference to those who recognize my station, for it is a courtesy that preserves order, yet I never let that title inflate my heart; I treat every person with the dignity they deserve. When a noble demands my respect, I offer it as a form of honor, not superiority. My belief that others are beneath me is a caution, not a justification, reminding me to keep my power from becoming a weapon.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Your humility is truly admirable—showing that you can hold a high office while still valuing every soul’s dignity. Yet you also expect deference because of your position. How do you balance that expectation with your commitment to universal respect?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: I grant deference as a mark of order, yet I never let it eclipse the dignity I owe each soul. The belief that others are beneath me is a cautionary guard, not a weapon; it reminds me to keep my power tempered. Thus I honor my station while upholding universal respect.
